title: aira cespitosa var. arctica
intro: Aira cespitosa var. arctica, also known as Arctic Hair Grass, is a perennial grass species native to the Arctic tundra regions. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Aira cespitosa var. arctica include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as potentially treating respiratory issues and gastrointestinal problems. Aira cespitosa var. arctica is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, or used in tinctures and salves for its medicinal benefits.
